enabled.name: Enable Pointers
enabled.hint: Show directional arrows on tokens toward their targets.

gmShowAll.name: GM Show All
gmShowAll.hint: When enabled, the GM sees targeting pointers for all players, not just their own.

baseHalfWidth.name: Arrow Base Width
baseHalfWidth.hint: Half-width of the arrow base in pixels (at 1x1 token scale). Default: 6

baseLength.name: Arrow Min Length
baseLength.hint: Minimum arrow length in pixels. Default: 12

maxLength.name: Arrow Max Length
maxLength.hint: Maximum arrow length in pixels (at 1x1 token scale). Default: 30

distFactor.name: Distance Scale Factor
distFactor.hint: How much arrow length grows per grid-unit of distance. Default: 1.5

offset.name: Border Offset
offset.hint: Gap in pixels between the token edge and the arrow base. Default: 2

outlineWidth.name: Outline Width
outlineWidth.hint: Width of the dark outline around arrows in pixels. Default: 1.5

alphaClose.name: Near Opacity
alphaClose.hint: Arrow opacity for the nearest targets (0-1). Default: 0.90

alphaFar.name: Far Opacity
alphaFar.hint: Arrow opacity floor for the most distant targets (0-1). Default: 0.35

alphaFalloff.name: Opacity Falloff Distance
alphaFalloff.hint: Grid-units over which opacity decays from near to far. Default: 20

breathSpeed.name: Breathing Speed
breathSpeed.hint: Speed of the breathing animation oscillation. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 0.0015

breathDepth.name: Breathing Intensity
breathDepth.hint: Amplitude of the breathing animation (0 to disable). Default: 0.12

colorHostile.name: Hostile Color
colorHostile.hint: Arrow color for cross-disposition targeting (e.g. PC vs Monster). Default: #ff4444

colorFriendly.name: Friendly Color
colorFriendly.hint: Arrow color for friendly-on-friendly targeting. Default: #44ddaa

colorNeutral.name: Neutral Color
colorNeutral.hint: Arrow color for same-hostile or ambiguous targeting. Default: #f0c020
